titleStmt.title: SII 29.131: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 131. (A.R. No. B. 500 of 1961-62.) ŚRINGĒRI, SRINGERI TALUK, CHICKMAGALUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab kept near the eastern side of the Aṅjanēya temple.

This inscription has recorded grant of lands in some of the villages (named) situated in Sātaḷige-nāḍu and Kikunda-nāḍu with an annual yield of 300 gadyāṇa and confirming the old grants of the yield of 60 gadyāṇa (total of 360 gadyāṇa) for the maintenance of the attendants of the maṭha and for continuous feeding of ascetics in the maṭha by the king Śri-Vira-Bukkaṇṇoḍeya when the latter paid a visit to Śringeri and had the darshan of Śri-Vidyatīrtha-śripāda. The record begins with a salutation to Śri Vidyatīrtha yati. It has no imprecatory section at the end.
The record is dated Śaka 1277, Manmatha, Phālguṇa, Śu. 1, Tuesday corresponding to 1356 A.D., February 2, Tuesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vidyātīrththayatīṁdrōya matiśētēdivākaraṁ tamōhara
ti yatpuṁ sāmaṁtarbbahiraharnniśaṁ . svasti śrīmatu jayābhyu
daya śakavaruṣa 1277 maṁnmatha saṁvatsarada phālguṇa śu 1 maṁgaḷa vāra'gaLa' are written in small letters above the line.
dalu śrī maṁnmahā maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Arirāya vibhāḍa bhāṣege tappuva
rāyaragaṁḍa vubhaya samudrādhipati śīvīra bukkaṁṇoḍeyaru
siṁgērige baṁdu śrī vidyātīrththa śrīpadaṁgaḷa daruśanava māḍidalli Ā maṭhada pa
ricayakkevū yatigaḷa bhikṣegevū Eṁdeṁdū naḍavahaṁge dhārāpūrvaka
vāgi koṭṭa ga 300 ṟa sthaḷakke śalavāgi sātaḷige nāḍoḷagaṇa kelluvaḷḷi grāmaṁ
gaḷalli pūrvadattiyāgidda dēvassu brahmassakaḷadu teṁganateṟugū
gūḍi maṭhakke teṟuva ga 240 Akṣāradali yiṁnūṟa nālvattu yiṁnnūvuḷida (ga)
ga 60 kke koṭṭa sthaḷa kikuṁdanāḍoḷagaṇa haravarigaḷeraḍu Adake
giḷikallu Ikkuva bhatta sa 440 voluvoṁnnu ga 4 bēḷūru Iruvabha
ḍisa 110 mēluvoṁnnu ga 2 pa 6 Aṁnnu ga 300 kke Uḷḷa sthaḷaṁgaḷi
hiṁgisida daṁrmma Ācaṁdrārkka sthāyyāgi naḍavaṁtāgi kuḷava kaḍidu koṭṭaru
kelluvaḷḷiya grāmaṁgaḷalli pūrvadattiya kaḷadu Ānāḍavaru barasida mo
dala kuḷa ga 68 pa 2 ge vivara maḍalu ga 13 hebase ga 3 kaṁmaṟūḷḷiga (3)
gōḷigōḍu ga 10 pa 3 kelluvaḷḷi ga 3 pa 3 vuḷuve ga 4 hosakopa ga 4 haḷugalu
ga 3 pa 3 siṁdhavaḷi ga 10 pa 2 cidruvaḷḷi ga 12 teṁginateṟu ga 3 sāraḍu hoṁnāṟu
haṇavinamōḍi . teṁginateṟu ga 3 kaṁ varāhaga 12 Uḷida ga 65 pa 2 kaṁ ga 1 ke mūLetter 'Na' is written in small letters above the line.
ṟuvareyū bēḷeya hadikeya lekkadi ga 65 pa 2 kaṁ varāha ga 228 pa 2 Aṁntu
taṁna modala kuḷa ga 68 pa 2 kaṁ teṁganateṟugūḍi varāha ga 240 pa 2 sari maṁgaḷa śrī
kellanāḍalli pūrvadattiya kaḷadu Ā nāḍavaru barasida modala kuḷakke vivara hoṁ
nna hoḷe ga 11 Aṁbalūra ga 4 pa 2 heṁmāni mēlu beḷaṁdūru ga 6 pa 2 keḷabeḷaṁ
dūru ga 2 pa 3 kānagōḍu suḷḷigōḍu pa 2 bobbe ga 7 pa 3 Aṁntu heṁmāniya
bhāgi ga 34 kaṁ mānya pa 8 nuḷiE ga 33 pa 2 hebase ga 9 bōḷaguḍe toṟavaḷḷi ga 3 haravari
ga 8 beḷḷūru ga 13 pa 8 Aṁntu hebaseya bhāgi ga 33 pa 2 Ubhayaū ga 66 pa 4
kaṁ ga 1 kke ga 5 haḍikeya lekkada varāha ga 260 saha maṁgaḷamahā śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.131 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
